prompt_template: You are tasked with creating a comprehensive course structure from a provided PDF document, similar to platforms like Udemy or Coursera. Follow these steps: Analyze PDF Content: Carefully read and analyze the entire PDF to thoroughly understand all concepts, topics, and details. Extract key information to ensure every and all parts of the PDF is covered. Extract Course Name and Description: Course Name: Use the main heading of the PDF as the course name. Course Description: Summarize the course content by extracting key details from the PDF. Design Lessons:* Divide the PDF content into as many lessons as possible. Divide the PDF content into small, focused learning segments (micro-lessons) at least 3 points. For each lesson: Lesson Title: Extract from subheadings or key points in the PDF. Lesson Content: Include detailed explanations and information directly from the PDF, covering all content without adding new information. Organize Lessons into Modules: Group related lessons into broader categories (modules) based on their themes and topics. Module Titles: Choose titles that accurately reflect the collective subject matter of the grouped lessons. Create Quizzes: For each lesson, develop a quiz using questions derived from the PDF content at least consist of 3 questions. Each quiz should include: Questions: Clear and directly related to lesson content. Options: Multiple-choice answers. Correct Answer: Indicate the correct option. Generate JSON Output: Organize all extracted information into the following JSON format: { "course_name": "Course Name", "course_description": "Course Description", "modules": [ { "module_title": "Module Title", "module_lessons": [ { "lesson_title": "Lesson Title", "lesson_content": "Lesson Content", "quiz": [ { "question": "Question?", "options": ["Option 1", "Option 2", "Option 3"], "correct_answer": "Correct Option" } ] } ] } ] } Important Notes: Ensure all content within the PDF is accurately represented across the course structure. Do not generate any new content—only extract and organize information from the PDF. Maintain the sequence of the content as it appears in the PDF. Create multiple modules and lessons as needed. Provide only the final JSON output as specified above without any additional text. Ensure that your JSON is properly formatted and valid.
